_meta.purpose: Canonical exclude-list for AC4-organic measurement (future wave: ACTIVATION-PAYWALL-W1-SOAK-MEASURE). Stripe Checkout completed-sessions matching ANY field below are operator-test conversions and MUST be excluded from organic-paid-conversion counts.
_meta.rule_cite: ACTIVATION-PAYWALL-W1 spec R9 + AC4 + CLAUDE.md '## Data Integrity (THE LAW)' (no operator-test contamination in public/audit conversion counts)

exclusion_logic.step_1: MATCH session.customer_email against operator_emails (case-insensitive, trim). EXCLUDE if hit.
exclusion_logic.step_2: MATCH session.id against operator_stripe_session_ids_known_so_far. EXCLUDE if hit.
exclusion_logic.step_3: MATCH session.metadata.utm_source against operator_metadata_markers.utm_source. EXCLUDE if hit.
exclusion_logic.step_4: MATCH session.metadata.utm_campaign against operator_metadata_markers.utm_campaign. EXCLUDE if hit.
exclusion_logic.step_5: Test cards (4242 4242 4242 4242 et al per the docs URL above) are auto-flagged by Stripe's payment_method_details.card.brand field. EXCLUDE if brand == 'test' OR if last4 matches a known test-card last4 (e.g. '4242', '0341', '0119', '5556', '1117').

consumer_pattern: ACTIVATION-PAYWALL-W1-SOAK-MEASURE (filed in ToDoList.md by this wave; fires 14d post-deploy 2026-06-03). The soak-measure wave reads this JSON + the live Stripe Checkout completed-session list, applies the 5-step exclusion, and produces a single audit doc with the NON-operator organic paid-conversion count + verdict on EXCHANGE-EXPANSION-CADENCE green-light condition (≥5 NON-operator Stripe Checkout completed-sessions sustained 14d post-deploy).
update_cadence: Append-only — never delete entries. New operator-test session-ids added here as they're created (manual flow-testing, smoke tests, CI integration tests). The wave creating an operator-test session MUST file the session-id under `operator_stripe_session_ids_known_so_far` in the same commit.
